mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM app_auction_one_price_car_log t1 left join app_auction t2 on t2.id = t1.car_id WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId} and t1.status = 4 and t2.car_state != 12
SELECT count(distinct t2.id) FROM app_auction_one_price_car_log t1 left join app_auction t2 on t2.id = t1.car_id WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId} and t1.status = 4 and t2.car_state != 12
SELECT sum(amount) FROM app_auction_one_price_car_log t1 WHERE t1.status=2 and (t1.refund_status=1 or t1.refund_status=4) and t1.user_id=#{userId}
